Intimation- Disruption Of Operations Regarding 7h ago Minor fire at Karaikal EDC plant on 17 July 2026; no casualties, operations disrupted, damage under assessment.
Reg. 34 (1) Annual Report. 7h ago 32nd AGM on Aug 10, 2026; final dividend Rs2/share; corporate guarantee up to Rs28.86 crore proposed.

Intimation Of Receipt Of Trading Approval Letters From BSE Limited BSE approved trading of 40 lakh and 26.64 crore equity shares on 17 July 2026.
Shareholders meeting 22nd AGM on 12 Aug 2026 includes proposed Rs.250 crore corporate guarantee and director reappointments.
